Comment.value: This script is called from both translation scripts and from review scripts
Updated 2023-11-19 - Package progress ONLY include Package texts and Shared Titles texts are managed in a separate localisation

Stage Name Text status HT Text status MT 1. Language added - (text does not exist) - (text does not exist) 2. Text prepared for translation Not translated Not translate 3. Original text sent Not translated Sent to API + async translation id:¶[id_from_api] (async only) 4. Translated text imported Not reviewed Not reviewed 5. Translation in review In progress In progress 6. Translation approved Approved Approved
Status type = "progress" or "status" - decides what to report back
Or Title, Package and localisation code - from translation review?
Since 2023-11-19 onlyt Title progress is shown in Translation review - so no need for package id?
Show all localisation for this Title

Calculation.Text: FAT Localisation @ Package::Shared text localisation id

Comment.value: Text status can be: 1. Not translated 2. Sent to API (only asynchronous machine translation) 3. Not reviewed 4. In progress 5. Approved
Now Package only texts are logged
Only Title shared texts in this report
If looking at all texts in the whiole Title - from Translation review Change 2023-11-16: Only original texts with texts (not empty) are included but it took TOO long time to search

Calculation.Text: "Not translated: " & $not_translated & ", Sent to API: "& $sent_to_api & ", Not reviewed: " & $not_reviewed & ", In progress: " & $in_progress & ", Appproved: " & $approved
